[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 011100111 6
1 110101110 6
2 011111110 7
3 111110011 7
4 111101110 7
5 001111111 7
6 110110011 6
7 011011110 6

01 10 011111110 7 match 2
12 21 011111110 7 match 2
23 32 111101110 7 match 4
34 43 111001110 6
45 54 101111111 8
56 65 111111111 a
67 76 011111111 8
70 07 010111111 7

13 31 111011110 7

35 53 111110111 8

57 75 110111011 7

71 17 011111101 7
